dialogueChunks.intro: {player_name}, I need to tell you something I've never told anyone. Something I did years ago that I can't stop thinking about.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: When this place was under attack by {enemy_type}, I ran. I was supposed to hold the line with {target_npc}, but I abandoned my post and fled. {target_npc} held on alone and was badly injured because of it. They moved to another settlement {location_hint} and haven't spoken to me since. I've been gathering {quest_item} as a peace offering, but the road is dangerous.
dialogueChunks.outro: I don't deserve forgiveness. But I need to {quest_action}. {quest_stakes} depends on whether I can face what I did. {quest_origin} haunts me every day.

playerResponses.text: It takes courage to face what you did. I'll walk that road with you.
Cowardice has consequences. But so does trying to make it right. I'll help.
You abandoned someone in battle. That's not something a delivery can fix.

dialogueChunks.intro: I won't lie to you, {player_name}. What I'm about to ask you to help me with started because I did something unforgivable.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: Years ago, when times were desperate, I stole {quest_item} from {target_npc}'s household. It was irreplaceable, and I sold it to a trader who took it {location_hint}. I've carried that secret ever since. {target_npc} still searches for it. The trader's camp is in {enemy_type} territory now.
dialogueChunks.outro: I stole from someone who trusted me. The least I can do is risk my pride to give it back. {quest_action} is the only way to start. {quest_stakes} demands it. {quest_origin} started this.

playerResponses.text: Returning what you stole is the right first step. I'll help you take it.
Theft and guilt and dangerous territory. At least you're honest about it. I'm in.
You made your choices. Live with them.

dialogueChunks.intro: I lied, {player_name}. In front of the whole council, under oath, I lied. And an innocent person lost everything because of it.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: The council asked me if I saw {target_npc} commit a crime. I said yes, because the real guilty party was my relative and I was protecting family. {target_npc} was exiled and has been living rough {location_hint} ever since. My relative died recently, and now there's nobody left to protect. I need to find {target_npc} and bring them {quest_item} as proof of what really happened.
dialogueChunks.outro: Every day that passes with {target_npc} in exile is another day my lie draws breath. Help me {quest_action}. {quest_time_pressure}. {quest_stakes} depends on the truth.

playerResponses.text: An innocent person exiled by a lie deserves the truth. I'll help you find them.
You destroyed someone's life with false testimony. But trying to fix it counts for something.
Your guilty conscience isn't my problem.
